# Speech to Text
**ID:** speechToText  
**Type:** Atomic  
**Level:** IV  
**Rarity:** Common  
**Status:** Provisional

---

## Description
Transcribes spoken audio into accurate text, handling diverse accents, noise conditions, and multiple languages.

_None._
